data.title: Two dormant addresses for over 8 years transferred 200,000 ETH worth $785 million
data.description: According to Lookonchain, two wallets that had been dormant for over eight years were activated and transferred 200,000 ETH (worth $785 million) to two new addresses. The ETH in these two wallets primarily originated from Bitfinex, and their owners currently hold a total of 736,316 ETH, worth $2.89 billion, across eight wallets.

data.title: U.S. Government Shutdown Looms Amid Failed Senate Bill
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump stated that if the government must shut down, it should proceed. He expressed confidence in the economy, noting that prices are decreasing.

A temporary spending bill aimed at preventing a government shutdown failed to pass in the U.S. Senate. Consequently, President Trump canceled crucial meetings with Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer and House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries. These discussions were initially expected to avert a shutdown before the September 30 deadline.

Deutsche Bank analyst Jim Reid highlighted in a Wednesday morning report to clients that U.S. government funds might be depleted by next week's deadline, potentially leading to the first government shutdown since the winter of 2018-19.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 940 USDT with a 5.94% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Sep 26, 2025, 14:25 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 940 USDT and is now trading at 939.76001 USDT, with a narrowed 5.94% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Mira announces official airdrop claim and inquiry link
data.description: Mira announced on the X platform that due to excessive traffic, the server crashed and token claims are now open through a backup link. Officials also released query and claim links, and reminded users to only trust information released by the official Mira Network and Mira Foundation accounts.

data.title: High-Leverage Trader Faces Potential Liquidation Risk
data.description: According to Foresight News, a trader known as 'Insider Brother' is currently in a rolling position with no additional margin available. The trader's losses have increased to $1.146 million. They hold a Bitcoin short position with 40x leverage, opened at $108,855.4, with a liquidation price of $110,284.6. Additionally, they have an XRP short position with 20x leverage, opened at $2.71, with a liquidation price of $3.08. If Bitcoin's price rises by a few hundred dollars, the short position could face liquidation risk.

data.title: Market Anticipates Future Volatility Despite Current Stability
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Glassnode indicates that despite recent sell-offs causing fluctuations in short-term implied volatility, the market is reducing expectations for immediate price swings. Long-term volatility remains stable, suggesting that traders continue to value long-term options. This reflects a current market calmness, although significant future volatility is anticipated.

data.title: The price difference between MIRA on-chain and contract price is currently reported at $1.3
data.description: Market data shows that the MIRA on-chain price is 2.98 USDT, the contract price is 1.68 USDT, and the difference between the on-chain price and the contract price is 1.3 USD.

data.title: MIRA is currently trading at 3.14 USDT, a short-term increase of over 70%.
data.description: Market data shows that the MIRA on-chain price is 3.14 USDT, up more than 70% in a short period of time.

data.title: Bitget has launched U-margined MIRA perpetual contracts with a leverage range of 1-20x
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bitget has launched U-margined MIRA perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1x to 20x. Contract trading on BOT will also be available simultaneously. In addition, participants can participate in the CandyBomb event, where they can unlock airdrops by completing specific contract trading volume tasks. Individual participants can receive up to 200 MIRA, with a total prize pool of 40,000 MIRA. The event runs until 21:00 (UTC+8) on October 3rd.

data.title: Huma Finance Season 1 Airdrop Phase 2 is now live
data.description: Huma Finance announced on the X platform that the second phase of its Season 1 airdrop is now live, allowing users to claim and stake HUMA tokens. The claim window will close at 1:00 PM UTC on October 26th. Staking HUMA will earn a 10% annualized yield.

data.title: Crypto.com’s Cronos erases Trump pump gains, community questions demand
data.description:
Since the peak of the Trump news-driven rally, Cronos has lost more than $6 billion, or nearly 50% of its market cap.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/cro-erases-trump-pump-gains-community-questions-demand?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Solana's on-chain WBTC supply hits a record high, with its market capitalization exceeding $1.03 billion for the first time.
data.description: According to a post by SolanaFloor, the supply of WBTC on the Solana chain has reached 9,270, a record high, and its on-chain market value has exceeded US$1.03 billion for the first time.

data.title: Bitcoin Treasury Firm Empery Digital Has Executed a $50 Million Loan Agreement
data.description: Empery Digital, a Bitcoin treasury company, announced that it has executed a previously signed new $50 million term loan agreement, with a maturity date of August 31, 2026. The term loan will be used to repay in full outstanding borrowings under existing lending facilities, with no prepayment charges, and to provide additional capital for share repurchases. Additionally, Empery Digital's previously committed borrowing capacity has increased from $25 million to $35 million. As of September 18, 2025, the company had repurchased 3,522,233 shares of its common stock at an average price of $7.35 per share.

data.title: BlackRock and Simplify Introduce Innovative Bitcoin and Gold ETFs
data.description: According to Foresight News, CNBC reports that BlackRock has recently filed for a Bitcoin premium income ETF. Meanwhile, asset management firm Simplify is incorporating options strategies into its ETFs, YGLD and MAXI, which provide exposure to gold and Bitcoin futures, aiming to generate returns. Although these ETFs currently have relatively small scales, analysts suggest that with gold prices reaching new highs and the increasing adoption of Bitcoin, both gold and Bitcoin are transitioning from traditional 'safe haven' assets to revenue-generating investment assets.

data.title: August core PCE data supports gradual easing, and the Fed's rate cut pace will remain unchanged
data.description: CNBC commented that U.S. core PCE inflation remained largely stable in August, likely allowing the Federal Reserve to maintain its previously planned pace of interest rate cuts. The U.S. Commerce Department reported on Friday that the PCE price index rose 0.3% month-over-month in August, bringing the overall annualized rate to 2.7%. The more closely watched core PCE price index, which excludes food and energy, rose 0.2% month-over-month, bringing the annualized rate to 2.9%. Although the Fed's inflation target is 2%, these data are unlikely to change the course of policymakers, who stated last week that they expect two more 25 basis point rate cuts before the end of the year.

data.title: Layer-1s stake their claim as crypto’s backbone in 2025
data.description:
With stablecoin rules taking shape and tokenized assets entering the market, blockchain’s foundation is being tested and layer-1s are proving their staying power.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/layer-1s-stake-their-claim-as-crypto-s-backbone-in-2025?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Dormant Wallets Transfer $785 Million in Ethereum After Eight Years
data.description: According to TechFlow, on September 26, blockchain analysis platform Lookonchain reported that two Ethereum wallet addresses, inactive for over eight years, have been reactivated. These wallets transferred 200,000 ETH, valued at approximately $785 million, to two new addresses. The movement of such a significant amount of Ethereum has drawn attention within the cryptocurrency community, highlighting the potential impact on market dynamics.

data.title: The U.S. core PCE price index rose by 0.2% in August compared to 0.30% in the previous month.
data.description: The U.S. core PCE price index rose 0.2% in August, compared to 0.30% in the previous month and the expected 0.20%. (Jinshi)

data.title: After the PCE announcement, the US dollar index DXY fell more than 10 points in the short term and is now at 98.33
data.description: The US dollar index DXY fell more than 10 points in the short term and is now at 98.33. (Jinshi)

data.title: Analysts: If the PCE data deviates significantly from expectations, the market will fluctuate violently
data.description: Daniel Takieddine, co-founder and CEO of Sky Links Capital Group, said in a report that U.S. Treasury yields have remained relatively stable, but could be vulnerable to volatility if PCE personal consumption expenditures inflation data deviates from expectations. Takieddine said upcoming U.S. economic data will be crucial in shaping U.S. interest rate expectations, following a week of cautious rhetoric from Federal Reserve Chairman Powell and strong economic data. He said, "If today's data deviates significantly from expectations, both U.S. Treasury yields and the dollar could see renewed volatility." Investors are also cautious ahead of next week's release of monthly U.S. employment data. (Jinshi)
